understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on the current level without dying (and complete levels efficiently within the turn limit and limited attempts).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: You control the player on a grid with gravity acting in the current direction (here it was DOWN). MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts the player one tile horizontally if the destination is passable. CLICK targets specific clickable tiles to remove them; removing a supporting tile can cause the player to fall in the gravity direction until landing on the next solid/supporting tile (as seen when clicks removed tiles beneath the player and the player dropped several cells). Landing on a spike tile ends the run and restarts the level using one of the two attempts; each attempt has a limited number of turns/steps.
